image_description.title: Forest Ranger Character model pack
image_description.description:
Introducing the Forest Ranger Character model pack, featuring a detailed and stylized ranger complete with accessories. Perfect for animated films, games, or educational applications, this model embodies the spirit of the wilderness. 

Each model has 3 levels of detail: low-poly (1000 triangles for mobile), middle-poly (10,000 triangles for environment), and high-poly (100,000 triangles), which allows for the use of this model in production rendering (such as 3ds Max, Maya, Cinema4D, Blender, Vray/Corona/Cycles, and all others), game engines (Unity and Unreal compatible), and interactive presentations, providing a choice of detail based on the LOD System principle.

The model's textures are PBR, Diffuse, NormalMap, and reflection/roughness/metallic, which are suitable for any modern rendering engine. All models are accurately unwrapped and have no overlapping UV. All textures are 4096*4096 in size.

Ideal for use in nature exploration games, training simulations, and animated storytelling, this character brings charm and realism to any project.

If you like this model, please leave a comment and like it.
